title: SEYMAC stock Case for iPad 6th/5th Generation/Air 2 / Pro 9.7 inch, Heavy Duty Shockproof Cover with Screen Protector, 360° Rotating Stand/Hand Strap & Pencil Holder for iPad 9.7 Case, Camo+Pink
features: [Compatible Models]: Exclusively designed shockproof Case for iPad 6th/5th generation 9.7'' 2018/2017, Air 2 2014 and Pro 9.7 inch 2016 (Model: A1893 / A1954 / A1822 / A1823 / A1566 / A1567 / A1673 / A1674 / A1675). NOT for any other model

[Full Body Protection + Screen Protector]: This case for iPad 9.7 inch is designed with anti-shock material, with hard PC frame, soft silicone skin and built-in screen protector. 3-in-1 protective design to keep your 9.7 inch tablet from scratches, shocks, or drop damages

[360° Rotating Stand / Adjustable Hand Strap]: The rotatable kickstand can stably support your iPad 9.7 inch, helping free your hands and providing you with a more comfortable viewing/typing/drawing angle. With soft hand strap, you can hold your tablet securely with one hand and use it at any angle, convenient for meetings or traveling

[Portable Shoulder Strap]: The shoulder strap for iPad 6th/5th generation/Air 2/Pro 9.7 case is detachable and adjustable, both kids and adults can use it to carry the tablet easily, suitable for indoor and outdoor work or travel

[Convenient and Practical]: Built-in pencil holder to safely store the stylus and take it at any time to avoid loss (Stylus is NOT included). Precise openings make it easy to charge, plug in headphones and use buttons without removing the protective case
description: Product Description SEYMAC stock High-quality protection is what we are strongly committed to. We have been focusing on protection technology and design for more than 10 years. SEYMAC stock has a long history of being responsive to customers’ purchase requirements. Our cases provide tablets with ultimate protection. Choose SEYMAC stock, we know you won't be disappointed! COMPATIBILITY：ONLY for New iPad 6th/5th Generation (2018/2017), iPad Air 2 (2014) & iPad Pro 9.7 inch (2016). Model Number: iPad 6th Generation 2018: A1893 / A1954 iPad 5th Generation 2017: A1822 / A1823 iPad Air 2 2014 Model: A1566 / A1567 iPad Pro 9.7 2016 Model: A1673 / A1674 / A1675 Notice Please: Not for iPad 2 !! Please confirm your iPad Model before purchase! The iPad Pen / Pencil is not Included! Full Body Protective Case for iPad 6th/5th Generation / iPad Air 2 / iPad Pro 9.7 Inch Unique Features about iPad 6th/5th Generation Case / iPad Air 2 Case / iPad Pro 9.7 Case: Full Body Protective Case with Screen Protector Two front covers for your options: One with built-in screen protector, another without. Non-slip Inner Shell with 360° Rotating Hand Strap/ Kickstand. Soft Silicone Outer Skin -- Shock Absorbent & Impact Resistant. Precise Cutouts / Dust Proof Easy access to all buttons, controls and ports without having to remove your iPad from the case. The port plugs can prevent dust from entering into iPad so as to keep your iPad 6th/ iPad 5th/ iPad Air 2/ iPad Pro 9.7'' stay clean and debris free. Pencil Holder / Built-in Kickstand An extra stylus pencil holder is specially designed to help keep your iPad Pencil in place for handy use. Easy to plug in/out. The sturdy kickstand can be 360° rotated, help free your hands. Ideal for viewing & typing. Multifunctional Protective Case with Shoulder Strap / 360° Rotating Stand / Hand Srap, Suitable for Adults & Children. 360° Rotating Hand Strap/Stand & Adjustable Shoulder Strap, Making it More Convenient for You to Use iPad 9.7'' & Carry It for Outdoor Activities. The soft Hand Strap can be rotated 360 degrees, enables you to use your iPad 9.7 at any angle with single hand. The 360° rotating sturdy built-in kickstand provides more flexible and comfortable angles for your viewing and typing. Ideal choices for presentations, office work, online studying, etc. The length of the shoulder strap can be adjusted, perfectly fit for adults and kids. With the shoulder strap, you can carry your iPad 6th / iPad 5th / iPad Air 2 / iPad Pro 9.7 more conveniently for outdoors working, travelling or hiking. Also, you can hang your iPad at the back of car seat with the shoulder strap to free your hands and get more enjoyment. Especially friendly for kids on long trips. Heavy Duty Drop Protection, Keep Your iPad Safe.
